---
title: "Visual maps and adult cortical plasticity"
subtitle: "Learnings from human MRI"
author: "Brian Wandell"
date: "today"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
  pdf:
    keep-tex: false
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
# Pointing to the main project bibliography
bibliography: ../../paperpile.bib
---

# Introduction

This is a draft for an upcoming conference in London. The text and images generated here will eventually be transitioned into the core *Foundations of Vision (2nd Edition)* text. 

Creating this document in a subdirectory allows us to use Quarto to generate a standalone PDF presentation or paper without prematurely altering the main book build.

## Example Concept Area

Describe a new idea here...

## Initial Figure Drafts

Any images placed in `talks/2026-London/images/` can be freely edited and refined for the presentation. Once the idea is mature, we'll move the final asset into the root `chapters/images/` folder for the main book.

:::{.column-margin}
<!-- ![Draft Figure Title](images/draft-fig1.png){#fig-draft-1} -->
*(Placeholder for margin figure)*
:::

# References
